summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Sprint It app dark theme UI redesign completed successfully. All navigation, functionality, and dark theme implementation verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Dark theme successfully implemented with correct colors (body: rgb(9,9,11), sidebar: rgb(17,17,22))
All 5 navigation links (Dashboard, Ingest Data, Analysis, Documents, Assignments) work correctly
Dashboard page loads with dark theme - welcome hero, Run Full Pipeline button, 4 stage cards visible
Sidebar navigation works - all nav links clickable and navigate correctly
Ingest Data page - Load Sample Data button works, file dropzone visible, competitor section visible
Run AI Analysis button appears and works, navigates to Analysis page
Analysis page loads correctly with run analysis functionality
Documents page shows 'No Recommendations Yet' empty state correctly
Assignments page shows 'No Recommendations Yet' empty state correctly
Full pipeline flow works: Load sample data → Run AI Analysis → Analysis page navigation
TopBar pipeline dots visible and rendering correctly (4 dots with proper status styling)
Activity Feed component renders on Dashboard and shows events
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes (24 total elements found)
Dark theme has excellent contrast and readability
Purple accent colors (#8B7CF6) properly applied throughout
Clean, minimal futuristic design successfully implemented
No console errors or broken functionality detected
